hero.heading: Capturing your real moments
hero.text: Family sessions, weddings and events — even from a bird's-eye view. Natural light, genuine emotion, no stiff posing.

about.heading: I photograph what can't be repeated
about.p1: I'm a photographer from Plzeň at the start of my journey — and I see that as a strength. I'm still building my name, so I pour my full attention and energy into every shoot. You're not just another booking in the queue; you're people whose moment I want to capture as well as I possibly can.
about.p2: Family photography is what fulfils me most — spontaneous laughter, a hug, a look you can't pose for. I shoot both outdoors and indoors, but natural light is my domain. I work calmly and without rush, so everyone feels at ease in front of the lens. Alongside families, I also cover wedding reportage, events and aerial drone shots.

steps.title: Get in touch
steps.description: We'll agree on a date, a place and your ideas. I'm happy to answer any questions — just write or call.

steps.title: The shoot
steps.description: I arrive with light gear and you focus on nothing but yourselves. I guide the session naturally — no forced poses.

steps.title: Your selection
steps.description: I send previews of every photo by the next day. You simply pick the ones you like and I edit those.

steps.title: Finished photos
steps.description: I process and deliver your photos through an online gallery. Download them in high resolution, anytime and anywhere.

rodina.title: Family
rodina.description: Set up at your home in an improvised studio or outdoors — beautiful photos can happen anywhere, with anything, you just have to put a little work into it.

svatby_udalosti.title: Weddings & other events
svatby_udalosti.description: Weddings, celebrations, christenings, corporate and social events captured in motion.

dron.title: From the drone
dron.description: Aerial shots — places and moments from a bird's-eye view.

ostatni.title: Other
ostatni.description: Freer work and moments that didn't fit into the other categories.

pricing.heading: Transparent pricing
pricing.note: These are introductory prices — I'm gradually building my portfolio and want quality photography to be accessible. Every job is different; I'm happy to discuss non-standard requests or a combination of services individually.

rodina.title: Family session
rodina.description: Set up at your home in an improvised studio or outdoors — beautiful photos can happen anywhere, with anything, you just have to put a little work into it.

udalost.title: Events
udalost.description: Celebrations, christenings, corporate and social events.

dron.title: From the drone
dron.description: Aerial shots on their own, or as an add-on to another shoot.
features: As a shoot add-on from 800 CZK

items.name: Martina K.
items.text: The shoot felt completely natural and the boys even enjoyed it — no one expected that. The photos are beautiful and full of emotion. Thank you so much!

items.name: Tomáš & Lucie
items.text: We were looking for someone who doesn't feel like a photo machine. We found exactly that here. The photos arrived quickly and are precisely what we wanted.

items.name: Petra & Martin
items.text: Karel captured our day exactly as we'd hoped — naturally, without unnecessary staging. The photos are full of emotion and we keep coming back to them. Thank you!

items.question: How long does editing take?
items.answer: For family sessions and events, within 10 working days. For wedding reportage, expect 4–6 weeks — I carefully process every photo. If you need some of the photos sooner, we'll arrange it in advance.

items.question: Do you shoot outdoors and indoors?
items.answer: I shoot both. For family sessions I prefer outdoors for the natural light, but at home works too. I shoot a wedding day according to the schedule — be it a church, a registry office or a garden. I'll adapt to you.

items.question: What should I wear for a family session?
items.answer: Clothing in muted colours that suits you and feels comfortable. Avoid loud patterns and logos. Coordinated — but not uniform — colours work best. Leave the rest to me.

items.question: How does cancellation work?
items.answer: A shoot can be rescheduled free of charge up to 48 hours in advance. In case of bad weather, we'll always set a new date. Cancellation within 24 hours or a no-show may be charged.

items.question: Do you offer gift vouchers?
items.answer: Yes! A photo session makes a great gift — for a birthday, Christmas or just because. Write to me and I'll prepare a voucher tailored exactly to you.

items.question: How are the photos handed over?
items.answer: You'll receive the photos through a private online gallery — the link arrives by email. You download them in high resolution, and the gallery stays active for at least 3 months.

contact.heading: Let's meet
contact.intro: Write to me and I'll get back to you within 48 hours. I'm happy to answer any questions.
contact.areaText: Plzeň and surroundings — the Plzeň Region, or further afield by arrangement.
contact.responseText: I usually reply to messages within 24 hours. For anything urgent, please call.

contactForm.name: Full name
contactForm.messagePlaceholder: Tell me what you have in mind, when and where the shoot could happen...
contactForm.gdpr: I consent to the processing of my personal data for the purpose of responding to my message. The data will not be shared with third parties.
contactForm.successText: I'll get back to you within 48 hours. I'm looking forward to working together.
